div.p: veth pairs connect containers to bridge; NAT enables internet access

ol.li: Container-to-Internet: c1 → bridge → iptables (SNAT) → eth0 → internet
Response: internet → eth0 → iptables (DNAT) → bridge → c1 Key Components:

ul.li: Bridge (ctr0): Virtual switch, learns MACs, forwards frames
veth pairs: Virtual cables connecting namespaces
iptables NAT: Rewrites src/dst IPs for external traffic
